message:
fix: counter mode parity for transaction path, remove dead code (#2013 follow-up)

- Extract shared nextCounterIDTx/isCounterModeTx helpers from inline logic
- Add counter mode support to generateIssueIDInTable (transaction/wisp path)
- Remove unused GetNextIssueCounter public method (was dead code)
- Fix PR #2013 tests: add missing Status field that caused validation failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
